creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
I don't think, removing mod_dtcl is warranted. Although new 
development of Tcl-based web-sites should use mod_rivet or websh 
(www/websh), people maintaining existing sites -- or migrating them to 
new servers -- would still find mod_dtcl usable and useful.

Yours,

    -mi
